title: Code Quality, Input Validation & Defensive Hardening
rationale: Phase 5 research identified 14 improvement targets. Phase 6 addresses the critical/high items: unreachable exception handler, bare except blocks, input validation, message bounds, unbounded growth, and cloud_fallback silent failures.

stories.title: Fix unreachable exception handler in readiness.py + refine bare excepts
stories.description: Fix duplicate exception handler in _write_signal() (line 278 unreachable). Replace bare except Exception blocks in readiness.py, conversation_processor.py, and cloud_fallback.py with specific exception types.
acceptance: readiness.py:_write_signal has single exception handler (not duplicate)
At least 8 bare except-Exception replaced with specific types across core/prediction files
cloud_fallback.py rate-limit persistence logs errors instead of silently passing
Syntax check passes on all modified files
stories.notes: Fixed unreachable handler in readiness.py, specific exceptions in cloud_fallback.py

stories.title: Input validation and bounds checking
stories.description: Add message length validation to ConversationProcessor.process_message(). Add label length validation to companion onboarding inputs. Cap _session_messages list growth.
acceptance: process_message() rejects empty/whitespace-only messages with neutral ConversationSignals
process_message() truncates messages over 10000 chars with log warning
_session_messages capped at 500 entries (sliding window)
Onboarding labels truncated at 200 chars
All changes backwards-compatible (no breaking API changes)
stories.notes: Empty/oversized message validation, session cap 500, label truncation 200

stories.title: Unbounded growth fixes: message history, training buffer
stories.description: Cap companion _message_history at 200 entries. Cap readiness_v2 training buffer at 500 samples. Add cleanup in end_session().
acceptance: _message_history trimmed to last 200 entries on append
readiness_v2 training buffer capped at 500 samples (oldest dropped)
end_session() logs final session stats and closes resources cleanly
No memory leak in long-running companion sessions
stories.notes: Message history cap 200, training buffer cap 500 with oldest-drop

stories.title: Cloud fallback observability + rate-limit error logging
stories.description: Add info-level logging when local fallbacks are used instead of cloud. Add error logging for rate-limit persistence failures. Add daily count reset logging.
acceptance: Local fallback methods log INFO when invoked with pattern description
Rate-limit save/load failures log WARNING with error details
Daily count reset is logged once per day
Silent 'except: pass' blocks replaced with logged specific exceptions
stories.notes: INFO logging in 3 fallback methods, WARNING in rate-limit persistence

stories.title: Companion response edge cases: type checks and context sourcing
stories.description: Add type safety for outcome signal access in _generate_response(). Source confidence/vote from bridge outcome when available instead of hardcoded 0.5.
acceptance: outcome.streak accessed only after isinstance check or hasattr guard
Override predictor context pulls confidence from bridge outcome when available
Fallback to 0.5 only when outcome not available
No crash on None outcome or unexpected outcome type
stories.notes: hasattr guard on outcome.streak, bridge-sourced confidence/vote/regime

stories.title: Tests for input validation, bounds, and edge cases (US-260 through US-264)
stories.description: Write tests verifying the defensive hardening changes: message validation, label truncation, buffer caps, fallback logging, and type safety.
acceptance: Test: empty message returns neutral signals
Test: oversized message is truncated
Test: session message cap works (sliding window)
Test: training buffer cap works (oldest dropped)
Test: message history cap works
Test: onboarding label truncation
At least 12 new tests covering US-260 through US-264
stories.notes: 14 tests in test_aura_hardening.py covering all US-260 through US-264
